mapper.select: SELECT id, type_id, room_number, status FROM room WHERE type_id = #{typeId}
SELECT id, type_id, room_number, status FROM room WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE room SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room (type_id, room_number, status) VALUES (#{typeId}, #{roomNumber}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE room SET type_id = #{typeId}, room_number = #{roomNumber}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room WHERE type_id = #{typeId} AND status = 1
